ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the county is located */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the county data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source that collected the data */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type (e.g., testing, cases, mortality) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Overall quality score of the dataset */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the source information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data type information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "testing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the testing data belongs to */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the testing data was collected */,
  "individuals_tested" INTEGER /* Number of individuals tested */,
  "individuals_positive" INTEGER /* Number of individuals who tested positive */,
  "testing_date" TEXT /* Date when the testing data was collected */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Positive rate of the testing data */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., PCR, Antigen) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_data" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the case data belongs to */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the case data was collected */,
  "total_recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals recovered */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Date when the case data was collected */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases */,
  "cumulative_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_data" (
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the mortality data belongs to */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the mortality data was collected */,
  "underlying_cause_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths due to underlying causes */,
  "contributing_factor_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths due to contributing factors */,
  "mortality_date" TEXT /* Date when the mortality data was collected */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths */,
  "cumulative_deaths" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of deaths */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "active_cases" (
  "active_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each active case data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the active case data belongs to */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the active case data was collected */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "active_date" TEXT /* Date when the active case data was collected */,
  "new_active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new active cases */,
  "cumulative_active_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of active cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("active_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_active_cases_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positivity_rates" (
  "positivity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each positivity rate data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the positivity rate data belongs to */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the positivity rate data was collected */,
  "positivity_rate" REAL /* Positivity rate */,
  "positivity_date" TEXT /* Date when the positivity rate data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("positivity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positivity_rates_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the quality metric belongs to */,
  "quality_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality metric was calculated */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Specific quality metric used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_lineage" (
  "lineage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data lineage */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the lineage belongs to */,
  "lineage_date" TEXT /* Date when the lineage was created */,
  "lineage_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the lineage */,
  "lineage_type" TEXT /* Type of lineage (e.g., source, transformation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_lineage_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the source contributed to */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_date" TEXT /* Date when the source was added */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the relationship belongs to */,
  "related_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related dataset */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent-child, sibling) */,
  "relationship_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the relationship (e.g., strong, weak) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_relationships_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_relationships_related_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_governance" (
  "governance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each governance */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the governance belongs to */,
  "governance_date" TEXT /* Date when the governance was created */,
  "governance_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the governance */,
  "governance_policy" TEXT /* Specific governance policy applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("governance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_governance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_security" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the security belongs to */,
  "security_date" TEXT /* Date when the security was created */,
  "security_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the security */,
  "security_policy" TEXT /* Specific security policy applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_security_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_privacy" (
  "privacy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each privacy */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the privacy belongs to */,
  "privacy_date" TEXT /* Date when the privacy was created */,
  "privacy_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the privacy */,
  "privacy_policy" TEXT /* Specific privacy policy applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("privacy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_privacy_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
